programs.title: Call the Midwife
programs.desc: A new cohort of junior doctors join the midwives, including Timothy, who observes the contrast between clinical medicine and compassionate care at Nonnatus House; Violet announces her plan to shadow the midwives.

programs.title: MaryLand on Masterpiece
programs.desc: When sisters Becca and Rosaline receive shocking news about their mother, they fly to the Isle of Man to find out more and are reunited in their sorrow after years of distance.

programs.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programs.desc: Edmond locates Gaston, Villefort's illegitimate child, who has grown up to be a thief; Danglars discovers Fernand's treacherous deeds in Algeria and reveals all to the press.

programs.title: Great Performances
programs.sub_title: Now Hear This: The Iceland Sound
programs.desc: Uncovering how volcanoes and tight-knit communities inspire its artists.

programs.title: A Life Reimagined: The George Masa Story
programs.desc: Unraveling the mysterious life of George Masa, a Japanese immigrant whose photographs helped define the identity of the Great Smoky Mountains.

programs.title: Arthur
programs.sub_title: Arthur Writes a Story; Arthur's Lost Dog
programs.desc: Arthur spices up an autobiographical story with fantastic tales; Arthur's dog, Pal, gets lost at a street fair.
